summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lluvia Live new features. All backend APIs (22/22 tests passed - 100%) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Key features tested: 'por la sala' button opens personal room directly, chat photo sending, GIF permission system, Bot IA, and Control Panel.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/rooms/my-room returns existing room for Melvin (José)
Backend: POST /api/rooms/my-room creates new room for new user
Backend: POST /api/rooms/my-room returns 404 for invalid user
Backend: POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/chat-photo uploads photo successfully
Backend: POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/chat-photo returns 404 for invalid room
Backend: POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/chat-photo returns 404 for invalid user
Backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/can-use-gif returns true for Dueño
Backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/can-use-gif returns 404 for invalid user
Backend: POST /api/admin/grant-gif/{target_id} grants GIF permission
Backend: POST /api/admin/revoke-gif/{target_id} revokes GIF permission
Backend: POST /api/admin/grant-gif fails for non-dueño (403)
Backend: Avatar upload accepts GIF for Dueño
Backend: Avatar upload rejects GIF for regular user (403)
Backend: Avatar upload accepts PNG for regular user
Backend: POST /api/bot/command returns response
Backend: GET /api/bot/history returns message list
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns user list with gif_permission field
Backend: GET /api/rooms returns room list
Backend: GET /api/clanes returns clan list
Backend: Room has 9 seats by default
Backend: Room chat POST and GET work correctly
Backend: Login with Melvin_Live / test123 successful (role: dueño)
Frontend: Login with Melvin_Live / test123 successful
Frontend: 'por la sala' button (data-testid='nav-sala-btn') found in bottom nav
Frontend: Clicking 'por la sala' navigates directly to personal room (José)
Frontend: Room view shows 9 seats with data-testid='seat-btn-{n}'
Frontend: Chat photo button (📷) found with data-testid='chat-photo-btn'
Frontend: Chat input and send button found
Frontend: Profile page shows 'Panel de Administración' button
Frontend: Control Panel Dashboard shows stats (34 Usuarios, 13 Salas, 3 Clanes)
Frontend: Control Panel Users tab shows 33 GIF toggle buttons
Frontend: Control Panel Bot IA tab works - sent command and received response
Frontend: Bot responded with 'Total usuarios: 28' and action results
Frontend: Mío tab shows 'Salas Activas' section with 13 room cards
Frontend: Entering existing rooms from Mío tab works
Frontend: Popular tab shows 'Weekly Family Star' banner
Frontend: Popular tab shows lista/Pareja/Clan cards
Frontend: Popular tab shows 68 butterfly emojis (original design preserved)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with prefix 'test_myroom_', 'test_gif_', 'test_avatar_', 'test_png_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly: 1) 'por la sala' button in bottom nav calls POST /api/rooms/my-room and navigates directly to personal room (no prompt). 2) Chat photo button (📷) in RoomView sends photos via POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/chat-photo. 3) GIF permission system: GET /api/users/{id}/can-use-gif, POST /api/admin/grant-gif/{id}, POST /api/admin/revoke-gif/{id}. Dueño always can use GIF, Aristocracy 6+ can use GIF, or manual permission via admin. 4) Avatar upload rejects GIF for unauthorized users. 5) Bot IA works - responds to commands and shows action results. 6) Control Panel accessible from Profile, shows dashboard with stats, Users tab has GIF toggle per user. 7) Original design preserved: Weekly Family Star, lista/Pareja/Clan cards, butterflies.

features_verified.chat_photo_sending: Camera button (📷) sends photos via POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/chat-photo
features_verified.control_panel: Accessible from Profile, shows dashboard with stats
features_verified.original_design: Preserved - Weekly Family Star, lista/Pareja/Clan cards, butterflies
